properties.displayName: [ADE] Audit storage accounts with public blob access enabled
properties.description: Audits storage accounts where allowBlobPublicAccess is true. Public blob access exposes storage content to anonymous internet requests and should be disabled in hardened environments.

metadata.description: 'Audit' logs non-compliant storage accounts. 'Deny' prevents enabling public blob access. 'Disabled' turns the policy off.
